author: SantiMod
content:
Hello Metaverse!
This week, we are hosting another Atlassian Town Hall on Discord! 
Join us here on Friday at 2:30 pm PST for Alpha leaks like the Official Unveiling of the highly demanded Opal Jetjet!
⚡️You’ll also be the first to know the winner of the Space Pet community vote! 

 Make sure to post questions or topics you want us to talk about in the ⁠No Access channel ahead of the event!
